summary: Video. A 2019 DHS and NASCAR 'See Something, Say Something' PSA. Driver Kurt Busch stands in his racing suit and speaks directly to camera, telling fans at the track that safety is everyone's responsibility and to report suspicious activity. It is a static narrated spokesperson spot with NASCAR and DHS logos. It predates the second Trump administration.
notable_text: Protect your every day. If you see something, say something. REPORT SUSPICIOUS ACTIVITY. NASCAR / SeeSay / Homeland Security.
